text: 4588 - وَ رَوَى سَعْدَانُ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "لاَ يَتَزَوَّجُ اَلْيَهُودِيَّةَ وَ لاَ اَلنَّصْرَانِيَّةَ عَلَى حُرَّةٍ مُتْعَةً وَ غَيْرَ مُتْعَةٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4588 - It is narrated from Sadan, from Abu Basir, from Abu Abdillah (as), who said:
"A man should not marry a Jewish or Christian woman alongside a free Muslim woman, whether in Mutah (temporary marriage) or in a permanent marriage."
